simple_types.name: DBGPWRUPREQ_ACTIVE_Field
simple_types.code:
type DBGPWRUPREQ_ACTIVE_Field is
   NotActive,
   Active)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: ENABLE_ENABLE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ENABLE_ENABLE_Field is
   DISABLED,
   ENABLED)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DISABLED
enumeration_literals.description: Enable debug domain and aquire selected GPIOs

simple_types.name: SYSPWRUPREQ_ACTIVE_Field
simple_types.code:
type SYSPWRUPREQ_ACTIVE_Field is
   NotActive,
   Active)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: TRACEPORTSPEED_TRACEPORTSPEED_Field
simple_types.code:
type TRACEPORTSPEED_TRACEPORTSPEED_Field is
   DIV1,
   DIV2,
   DIV4,
   DIV32)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: DIV1
enumeration_literals.description: Trace port speed equals CPU clock divided by 2

enumeration_literals.name: DIV2
enumeration_literals.description: Trace port speed equals CPU clock divided by 4

enumeration_literals.name: DIV4
enumeration_literals.description: Trace port speed equals CPU clock divided by 32

record_types.name: DBGPWRUPREQ_Register
ENABLE_Register
SYSPWRUPREQ_Register
TAD_Peripheral

fields.name: DBGPWRUPREQ
fields.description: Enable debug domain and aquire selected GPIOs

record_types.name: TRACEPORTSPEED_Register

variables.name: GLOBAL_TAD_NS_Periph
variables.code:
GLOBAL_TAD_NS_Periph : aliased TAD_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GLOBAL_TAD_NS_Base;

variables.name: GLOBAL_TAD_S_Periph
variables.code:
GLOBAL_TAD_S_Periph : aliased TAD_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GLOBAL_TAD_S_Base;
